summary: lead-enrich-batch --resume must require --output; resumption only skips rows recorded in the output file, so allowing --resume without --output silently reprocesses and re-bills every row.
reason: Without the guard the flag is a no-op that burns full API credits on a run the operator expected to be mostly free, with no error or warning. Validation must reject the combination up front.
validated_outcome: lead-enrich-batch --resume without --output now exits 2 with a usage error; covered by TestLeadEnrichBatchResumeRequiresOutput.
